cells.xml_text_content:
Table 1.
Number of persons with Social Security (OASDI) taxable earnings, amount taxable, and contributions, by state or other area, sex, and type of earnings, 2020
cells.pdf_text_content:
Table 1.
Number of persons with Social Security (OASDI) taxable earnings, amount taxable, and contributions, by state or other area, sex, and type of earnings, 2020

cells.xml_text_content: SOURCE: Social Security Administration, Continuous Work History Sample, 1 percent sample.
cells.pdf_text_content: SOURCE: Social Security Administration, Continuous Work History Sample, 1 percent sample.

cells.xml_text_content: NOTES: State designation is based on employee residence.
cells.pdf_text_content: NOTES: State designation is based on employee residence.

cells.xml_text_content: OASDI = Old-Age, Survivors, and Disability Insurance.
cells.pdf_text_content: OASDI = Old-Age, Survivors, and Disability Insurance.

cells.xml_text_content: Based on Social Security annual maximum taxable earnings of $137,700 in 2020.
cells.pdf_text_content: Based on Social Security annual maximum taxable earnings of $137,700 in 2020.

cells.xml_text_content: Includes both employee and employer contributions. Data are not adjusted for tax refunds to persons who made excess contributions because they worked for two or more employers.
cells.pdf_text_content: Includes both employee and employer contributions. Data are not adjusted for tax refunds to persons who made excess contributions because they worked for two or more employers.

cells.xml_text_content: Workers with earnings from both wage and salary employment and self-employment are counted in each type of employment but only once in the total.
cells.pdf_text_content: Workers with earnings from both wage and salary employment and self-employment are counted in each type of employment but only once in the total.

cells.xml_text_content: Includes persons employed in American Samoa, Guam, Northern Mariana Islands, and U.S. Virgin Islands; U.S. citizens employed abroad by U.S. employers; persons employed on U.S. oceanborne vessels; and workers with unknown residence.
cells.pdf_text_content: Includes persons employed in American Samoa, Guam, Northern Mariana Islands, and U.S. Virgin Islands; U.S. citizens employed abroad by U.S. employers; persons employed on U.S. oceanborne vessels; and workers with unknown residence.

cells.xml_text_content:
File available from:
U.S. Social Security Administration • Office of Retirement and Disability Policy • Office of Research, Evaluation, and Statistics
Earnings and Employment Data for Workers Covered Under Social Security and Medicare, by State and County, 2020
https://www.ssa.gov/policy/docs/statcomps/eedata_sc/2020/
